# Test Company — L10 Meeting Agenda

*Every Tuesday, 90 minutes*
**Attendees:** Alice, Bob, Carol

---

## 1. Segue (5 min)

*Share one personal and one professional piece of good news.*

---

## 2. Scorecard Review (5 min)

*Review weekly metrics. Drop any off-track numbers to Issues.*

---

## 3. Rock Review (5 min)

*Each owner reports on-track or off-track for their Rocks.*

---

## 4. Headlines (5 min)

*Customer/employee/industry news the team should know about.*

---

## 5. To-Do Review (5 min)

*Review last week's To-Dos. Target: 90%+ completion.*

---

## 6. IDS (60 min)

*Identify, Discuss, Solve the most important issues.*

---

## 7. Conclude (5 min)

*Recap To-Dos, cascading messages, and rate the meeting 1-10.*
